## Deployment / Pre-Merge Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please check the following:
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`cargo fmt`).
- [ ] I have run local clippy checks (`cargo clippy`).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed (`cargo test`).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] There are no known performance or security regressions.
- [ ] Code has been reviewed by at least one other developer.
